prompt:
Replicate this EXACT infographic layout with surgical precision on a pure black background (#000000). Aspect ratio 16:9 landscape.

The funnel structure is on the LEFT SIDE, centered at ~22% from left. Text labels on the RIGHT SIDE from ~42% to 85%.

LEFT SIDE — FUNNEL STRUCTURE (large, occupying ~90% of canvas height):

1. TUBE + SPHERES (top 0% to 55% of canvas height):
- A SOLID OPAQUE vertical rectangular column behind the spheres. Dark blue-violet color (#0D0D3A) with subtle lighter edges (#1A1A6B). The tube is straight, rectangular, solid — NOT glass, NOT transparent. Width approximately 10% of canvas.
- Inside/in front of the tube, exactly 4 SOLID glossy spheres. They are ALL the SAME blue color — a rich royal blue (#2050CC) to (#1040AA). Each sphere has a white specular highlight on the upper-left and darker shading on the lower-right.
- CRITICAL: The spheres DECREASE IN SIZE from top to bottom:
  - Sphere 1 (top, at ~8% height): LARGEST, approximately 11% canvas width
  - Sphere 2 (at ~20% height): slightly smaller, approximately 9.5% canvas width
  - Sphere 3 (at ~32% height): smaller, approximately 8% canvas width
  - Sphere 4 (at ~42% height): SMALLEST, approximately 6.5% canvas width
- All spheres are centered on the same vertical axis as the tube.

2. FUNNEL CONE (from ~52% to ~75% height):
- A solid 3D inverted cone/funnel. Same rich blue color (#2050CC to #0D0D3A darker at bottom). Wide opening at top (~28% canvas width), narrowing to small exit (~4% canvas width). Simple solid shape, subtle 3D shading. The rim at top is a simple ellipse showing slight perspective depth.

3. DOWNWARD ARROW (from ~76% to ~95% height):
- A LARGE solid downward-pointing arrow. Composed of a rectangular shaft (~6% canvas width, ~10% height) and triangular arrowhead (~16% canvas width). Same blue color (#1040AA to #0D0D3A). This arrow is BIG and prominent.
- NO sphere below the arrow.

RIGHT SIDE — TEXT LABELS WITH THICK ARROWS:

Each label has a THICK horizontal arrow pointing RIGHT (→) from the 3D element toward the text. The arrows are white, approximately 3-4px thick lines with bold triangular arrowheads. The arrows are THICK and visible — NOT thin hairlines.

- At ~8% height (aligned with sphere 1): THICK white arrow → then bold white text 'Atraemos al cliente ideal'
- At ~20% height (aligned with sphere 2): THICK white arrow → then bold white text 'Capturamos el contacto'
- At ~32% height (aligned with sphere 3): THICK white arrow → then bold white text 'Calificamos en segundos'
- At ~42% height (aligned with sphere 4): THICK white arrow → then bold white text 'Agenda o llama automáticamente'
- At ~65% height (aligned with funnel): THICK white arrow → then bold ITALIC blue text (#4080FF) 'Nutrición y' on first line, 'seguimiento' on second line
- At ~88% height (aligned with arrow): THICK white arrow → then bold ITALIC blue text (#4080FF) 'Tu equipo solo ve' on first line, 'ventas realizadas' on second line

The text is clean, bold, modern sans-serif (like Montserrat ExtraBold). White text is pure white (#FFFFFF). Blue italic text is bright blue (#4080FF). Text size is large and very readable — approximately 3.5% of canvas height.

STYLE: Clean corporate infographic. The 3D elements are simple, solid, polished — like the reference image. Think premium business presentation slide. NOT photorealistic, NOT abstract art. Simple, bold, professional.

CRITICAL: Pure black background. Spheres decrease in size top to bottom. ALL spheres same blue color. Arrows point RIGHT (→) not left. Arrows are THICK not thin. Text is perfectly spelled in Spanish with accents (ó, á, é).
negative_prompt: transparent spheres, glass, frosted material, translucent, thin arrows, hairline arrows, left-pointing arrows, backward arrows, colored backgrounds, white background, gradient backgrounds, blurry text, misspelled text, warped text, multiple funnels, scattered elements, photorealistic scene, room, abstract art, cartoon, low resolution, noise, watermarks, rainbow colors, multicolored spheres, purple spheres, violet spheres, orange spheres, cyan spheres, yellow spheres, green spheres, small text, illegible text

settings.style: clean corporate infographic with solid 3D elements
settings.quality: crisp bold text, solid 3D shapes, thick arrow lines
